profile.name: Rishu Gupta
profile.bio: B.Tech CSE Undergraduate (2022–2026) at Siliguri Institute of Technology. Specializing in real-time synchronized systems, scalable backend architectures, and AI-powered solutions. Dedicated to building efficient, user-centric digital products.

projects.title: Sync Social Video
projects.synopsis: Real-time synchronized video streaming platform with room-based architecture.
projects.description: Implemented live synchronization for shared viewing experiences using Socket.io and Firebase. Integrated AI-powered suggestions via Genkit.

projects.title: Full-Stack E-commerce
projects.synopsis: Complete shopping platform with secure payments and optimized database performance.
projects.description: Developed a robust MERN stack application featuring JWT authentication, Stripe integration, and high-performance MongoDB indexing.

projects.title: AI DSA Prep Hub
projects.synopsis: Intelligent learning platform with personalized study plans and AI code analysis.
projects.description: Built using Google Gemini API to explain concepts and debug code. Features a tracking dashboard for student progress.

projects.title: LMS Java Core
projects.synopsis: OOP-based library management system with modular design and borrowing workflows.
projects.description: Focuses on clean code principles, book cataloging, and administrative role-based access control.
